title: 1080P Ear Wax Removal Camera🔥-Electric

title: 12 Months Flea and Tick Free-Green x1
description:
Natural Protection 
 All-Day Comfort, 
 and Year-Round Peace of Mind 
    
 Key Features 
 
 Easy to Use - Simply attach to your dog's collar and forget about pests. 
 Waterproof & Weather- Resistant - Ideal for swimming, muddy walks, or rainy adventures. 
 Fits Most Collars - Attaches easily to any collar, thanks to its flexible design. 
 Long-Lasting Shield - 12 months of continuous flea and tick protection. 
 
 Why Pet Owners Choose It 
 
 All-Natural Ingredients 
 12-Month Continuous Protection 
 Waterproof & Weatherproof 
 No Chemicals or Messy Drops 
 Stretch-Fit for Any Collar 
 Vet-Friendly and Easy to Use 
 Tired of messy sprays and chemical treatments? 12 Months Flea and Tick Free: All-Natural Formula - Safe, effective, and chemical-free protection. 
 Worried about your dog picking up ticks on walks or hikes? 12 Months Flea and Tick Free: 12-Month Continuous Shield - Repels pests wherever your dog goes. 
 
 Protect Your Pet Naturally 
 Keep fleas and ticks away-without the chemicals, stress, or vet visits. 
 
 Gentle, Effective Protection All Year Round: A simple pendant, a powerful barrier-defend your pet for up to 12 months. 
 Safe for Dogs & Cats, Tough on Pests: Made from essential oils like citronella and cedarwood-no toxins, no irritation. 
 Adventure-Ready, Worry-Free: Rain? Mud? River swim? No problem. This pendant keeps protecting through it all. 
 Clip On and Go: No drops. No pills. Just attach it to the collar- done in seconds. 
 
 Specifications 
 
   Product Specifications  
   
 ● Dimensions: 
 
 1*3.81*7.62 cm/0.39*1.5*3 inch 
 
 
 
 
 ● Weight: 
 
 
 80 g/2.82 oz 
 
 
 
 
 ● Colors: 
 
 
 Black, Pink, Green 
 
 
 
   
 
   
 Customer Feedback 
 
 I put it on my dog and forgot about it-no scratching, no fleas, just peace of mind. 
 We hike often with our dog and this keeps ticks away without harsh chemicals. Love it!

description:

   🔥94.3% of Reviewers Recommends This Product.   
  Archimedes might yell “Eureka!” if he could see this cool precipitation-measuring device.  
   
 the story 
   
 IF IT FLOATS YOUR BOAT 
 “Eureka!” cried Archimedes as he leapt from his bath and went running naked through the streets of Syracuse, Sicily. Apparently he was  very  excited about discovering how the whole buoyancy thing works. Sadly, the legend probably isn&rsquo;t true, but his famous principle is. This gauge lets you see it in action every time it rains.  Archimedes&rsquo; Principle&mdash;which states that the upward buoyant force exerted on anything immersed in fluid is equal to the weight of the fluid that the object displaces&mdash;is why boats float. It&rsquo;s also the reason the tube in this rain gauge rises as its base fills with water. Known as a pluviometer to science types (you know, the ones who might enjoy hearing all this Archimedes stuff when you show them your cool new gadget), it&rsquo;s available in a patio-ready tabletop version or on a garden stake.  
   
   
   
   
 a useful and decorative tool for gardeners, weather buffs and gadget geeks 
   
   
   
 CARE 
 Occasionally clean the tube and flute with warm, soapy water and a bottle brush. Do not use lubricants or abrasives. 
   
  🎁  It's a perfect gift for your friends&familly!
